Sarah Egbert Carmi, passed away Monday Deaconess Gateway Hospital Newburgh. born December 1926 McLeansboro, daughter Azarah Salena (Gwaltney) McDaniel. married Wallace "Tom" Egbert July 1942 East Louis preceded death June 2000.
Early their marriage, Sarah operated Coal business. Later, they owned operated various bars Carmi area. member V.F.W American Legion Auxiliaries Ladies Moose. active Girl Scout Leader when children were young.
survived sons, Wallace "Wally" (Mary Ann), William "Bill" (Anna), Leslie "Les" (Judy), Larry (Linda) Mike "Spud" (Kim) Egbert; daughters, Carol (Van) Naylor, Glena (Delbert) Kelly Betty Beets; grandchildren, Numerous nieces nephews also survive. preceded death husband, sons, Eddie brothers sisters.
